agentTools.name: FIND_OFFICIAL_DOCS
agentTools.purpose: Locate official API, auth, MCP, and developer-portal URLs before considering secondary sources.

agentTools.name: LOOKUP_COMPOSIO_TOOLKIT
agentTools.purpose: Check whether Composio already has a matching or adjacent toolkit opportunity.

agentTools.name: CLASSIFY_CONNECTOR
agentTools.purpose: Convert evidence into auth, access, API surface, buildability, confidence, and blocker labels.

agentTools.name: VERIFY_EVIDENCE
agentTools.purpose: Challenge weak claims, missing docs, unsupported ready-now verdicts, and gated app assumptions.

note: This deterministic run mirrors the intended agent contract. Add search/LLM keys to replace or refresh seeded evidence before production use.
